MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-14-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MARCUS DUBROWOLSKI AND RENEE DUBROWOLSKI'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF COLBY BOWLES HAS NOT ALLEGED SUFFICIENT ULTIMATE FACTS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANTS ACTED DESPICABLY OR IN WILLFUL AND CONSCIOUS DISREGARD OF MR. BOWLES' RIGHTS OR SAFETY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion; Motion To Strike Punitive Damages; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS MARCUS DUBROWOLSKI and RENEE DUBROWOLSKI'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages is
GRANTED with twenty days leave to amend. Plaintiff Colby Bowles has not alleged sufficient ultimate facts showing that defendants acted despicably or in willful and conscious disregard of Mr. Bowles' rights or safety. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/hk
